changeSet.author: OGC-526
changeSet.comment: Add discovered_source_id column for bridge-discovered analyzer stubs

changeSet.author: OGC-526
changeSet.comment: Add UNREGISTERED_SOURCE to analyzer_error.error_type CHECK constraint

changeSet.author: OGC-526
changeSet.comment: UNIQUE index on discovered_source_id for race-safe idempotency
